title: Simply Astonishing Food
description:
This modification adds soups that replenish hunger over a long duration of time, just enough so the player doesn't need to spam eating regular food (which in my opinion heavily interrupts the natural gameplay flow).
  
In addition Petfood has been added.
body:
This modification adds soups that replenish hunger over a long duration of time, just enough so the player doesn't need to spam eating regular food (which in my opinion heavily interrupts the natural gameplay flow).
  
In addition, Animalfood has been added. 
Animalfood restores an animals (designed for wolves) health over time so that you don't need to spam rotten flesh either, but will still need to apply it when the animals health is low. It can be combined with magma cream to give the animal fire resistance. (Incase they get teleported into lava...) 

This mod has integrated advancements which means that you don't require additional mods in order to find the recipes. 
**The first advancement is found with clay!**

Note that soups do not stack and require a rather long time to cook. 

This mod is meant to be a vanilla enhancement. It doesn't have complicated gimmicks. 
Use Discord for communication.

![Showcase Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6i1x9Elt/images/ca23ca40f0dce300dad8fcdd436c87b5791757b3.png)
